# Ventilators Wave 2 Category Pack

## Required Fields

- Manufacturer, brand, model, variant;
- device type;
- patient groups;
- ventilation modes;
- power/battery;
- gas supply;
- alarms;
- dimensions and weight;
- accessories and consumables.

## Required Documents

- Registration certificate;
- IFU/user manual;
- datasheet/technical specification;
- accessories/compatibility list;
- service manual if public.

## Key Characteristics

- Tidal volume range;
- pressure range;
- flow range;
- FiO2 range;
- NIV support;
- neonatal/pediatric/adult support;
- battery duration;
- display size;
- weight;
- oxygen inlet requirements.

## Compatibility Requirements

- Breathing circuits;
- humidifiers;
- masks/interfaces;
- sensors;
- oxygen supply connectors;
- trolleys/mounts.

## Common Conflicts

- Battery duration differs by configuration.
- Patient groups differ between brochure and IFU.
- Ventilation modes are optional.
- Regional datasheets differ.

## Review Notes

Treat all patient group, mode and compatibility claims as high risk. Do not publish from brochure-only evidence.
